text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 71 

PTD_FILL_CNT 

LABEL: Part D Standardized Fill Count 

DESCRIPTION: Part D prescribing events (PDE) consist of highly variable days’ supply of the medication. This derived 
variable creates a standard 30 days’ supply of a filled Part D prescription and counts this as a 
standardized “fill.” 

This field is calculated using the source PDE field for the days supply of the
